adrs.title: the proposal block speaks `_meta`, not `frontmatter`
the authority model is a produced reference doc
rename the `reconcile` capability/lane token to `converge`; drop the dead `:reconcile_failed` event
job queue execution model; `reconcile` → `drain`/`serve`; async-only materialize
board-exact schema split + single port shape
two port shapes, named and documented (not converted)
adrs.status: Superseded by ADR 0109 — every port is now a single shape (an instantiable class); `Clock`/`Publisher` were converted.

adrs.title: split `manifest/schema.rb`: data vs validation walk
adrs.status: Partially superseded by ADR 0109 (the constants it kept on `Schema` now live in `Schema::Vocabulary`/`Schema::Keys`, re-exported on `Schema`).

adrs.title: the layering is executable, not just intended
the verb token has one home: route ⟺ contract
finish the root-doc canon move (CONTRIBUTING + SECURITY), clean up the drift
the root README is canon, published out
produce the event catalog from the registry
interface-layer fossils
`produce/` topology + de-fossilized names
one `Freshness` evaluator
Docs SSoT/DRY/SOLID cleanup: produce vs guard, single-sourced status
Reference docs become produced (projected/introspected, published out)
Does the conformance tier earn a distinct category?
collapse `derived`/`intake` into one `produced` kind
`source` produces data; one publish path renders
`source` + `retention` over one reconcile engine
Finish ADR 0080's cleanup: couple conformance to contract, not fixture spelling
One `machine` zone-kind; entry-kind is the single discriminator
Automation is one capability + one `upkeep` policy
Ingest is system-pushed: remove `get`'s read-through and `put --fetch`
Rename the quarantine capability `fetch` → `ingest`; name the verb/capability split
Fold `build` into a single `reconcile` pass; materialization becomes system-pushed
textus owns agent-integration config: consolidate the plugin manifest, fold MCP + hook into it, keep `init` as the no-plugin fallback
Two observability verbs on orthogonal axes; remove the public `freshness` verb
`boot` is delivered at session start via a SessionStart hook; textus ships the hook as a plugin
The contract-drift guard applies to writes only; `boot` and reads bypass it
Normalize the key-verb family stem (`key_mv`/`key_delete`) and remove the `migrate` orchestrator
Docs become canon, published out to `docs/`
Spec suite: a three-category physical split (unit / integration / conformance) over the lib mirror
adrs.status: Accepted · Phase 4 (evidence-gated retirement) executed by ADR 0092

adrs.title: Unify staleness + retention into one `lifecycle` policy; collapse the upkeep verbs; lazy by default
adrs.status: Accepted · §4 `freshness`-verb surface partially superseded by ADR 0085 (the unified lifecycle *policy* stands; the public `freshness` *verb* §4 kept is removed — its scan folds into `pulse` and goes Ruby-only) · the `tend` verb name + its destructive-only body are superseded by ADR 0087 (renamed `reconcile`, gains a materialize Phase 1; the "destructiveness decides execution site" thesis stands and is extended to source-change-decides-materialize-site)

adrs.title: `tend`: a composite upkeep pass so the cleanup lifecycle can run unattended
adrs.status: Partially superseded by 0079 — held before shipping. The `tend` verb and its authority stance (runs as the caller, never self-elevates) and the "scheduled, not a daemon" principle all stand; 0079 reshapes `tend`'s *body* from a composite of `fetch_all`+`retain`+`doctor` into the destructive-only sweep of the unified `lifecycle` model. This decision was reconsidered while still in review (never reached `main` as a composite verb); the reasoning is retained as the exploration that led to 0079. The verb *name* `tend` is retired by ADR 0087, which renames it `reconcile` and folds a materialize phase back in.

adrs.title: `init --with-agent`: an opt-in profile that wires a fresh store to an agent
`build` runs as the build actor, not the caller — surface it to MCP
`session_opened`: a connect-time hook event carrying the resolved role
The drift guard fingerprints the whole contract, not just the manifest
`surfaces` declares external projections; Ruby is the implicit base
`accept`/`reject` gate by capability, not by transport — surface them to MCP
`dry_run` is an opt-in preview, not a default — verbs apply by default on every surface
Built artifacts are content-addressed: no `generated_at` in the tracked output
Single-path lifecycle: views self-shape, one normalizer home, validation is unconditional
Declarative `source:`/`coerce:`/`cli_stdin`/`around:`/`cli_default:` dissolve the acquisition & wrapper escape hatches
Per-surface `view`s replace `response`/`cli_response` and the arity hack
One argument binder; `required:` is a surface policy, not a contract invariant
Finish the `cli_response` projection: shrink the output-only escape hatches
Derive the CLI command name; guard the dispatcher key against the contract verb
The CLI is a projection of the contract: close the last derive-or-guard gap
One `get`: unify the public read verb on read-through; keep `Read::GetEntry` as the internal pure primitive
Reconcile the `build`/`publish` vocabulary: the verb is `build`, `publish` is the output-destination noun
Close the agent safety asymmetry: graph-reads on MCP + default-dry-run on bulk-destructive verbs
adrs.status: Accepted (ships 0.44.0) · the default-dry-run half (decision §2) is **reversed by ADR 0071** — verbs apply by default again; the graph-reads-on-MCP half stands

adrs.title: One rule verb, two depths: merge `rules` + `policy_explain` into `rule_explain`
One verb name across surfaces: align the MCP tool, the CLI command, and the use-case method
Agent-legible MCP contracts: arg descriptions, `_meta` wire parity, derived `write_verbs`
`boot`'s agent surface speaks the MCP catalog, not a CLI dialect
Entry-level `desc`: the manifest as a navigable index
Remove `index_filename`: nested entries enumerate files
Fold `publish_to`/`publish_tree` into one typed `publish:` block
Remove `publish_each`: collapse publish to two modes
Own multi-file artifacts by native in-store authoring; migrate by content-identical adoption
adrs.status: Accepted · native authoring now rides **`publish_tree`** alone — `publish_each` was removed by ADR 0051 (the index-present `publish_each` references below are historical)

adrs.title: Publish modes as a resolved sum type + one shared subtree mirror
Fetch subsystem: separate intake invocation, deadline/async policy, and lifecycle events
`publish_tree`: a key-less subtree mirror for a derived-index leaf
`publish_each` publishes a leaf's whole subtree; siblings are opaque attachments, never keys
adrs.status: Accepted · the "no third key" ruling is scoped to the index-*present* case by ADR 0047

adrs.title: Close the role-name set to {human, agent, automation}; keep capabilities open
System-initiated actors are resolved by capability, never by a hardcoded role name
Feed ergonomics without breaking core purity: an intake cookbook, and environment as a `feeds.machine` snapshot
Native ignore patterns for entry enumeration (one shared filter seam, evaluated above legality)
Dogfood textus in its own repo: a self-development store + MCP wiring
The MCP connection acts as `agent`; human authority is a separate channel
The MCP catalog derives from one declared verb contract; no unguarded hand-maintained mirror
adrs.status: Accepted — ships 0.37.0 (**breaking**: MCP tool surface and core verb set change)

adrs.title: Runtime artifacts live under `.run/`; one `Layout` owns the map
adrs.status: Accepted · the `sentinels/` → `:config` classification (Decision §1) is **superseded by ADR 0070** — sentinels are machine-generated runtime state and move under `.run/sentinels/`; the `.run/` layout and `Layout`-as-map decisions stand

adrs.title: Boot/pulse: derive-or-guard, no unguarded hand-maintained mirror
Transports are pure framings: one verb vocabulary, one session, lifted to core
adrs.status: Accepted — ships 0.36.0 (**breaking**: MCP tool names change)

adrs.title: Constrain a proposal's target zone; keep the accept/reject anchor-gate explicit
Unify the zone-kind/capability bijection into a single Lane table
Complete the primitive set (`workspace` + `keep`) and clarify the vocabulary
Drop `read_policy`: textus gates writes, not reads
adrs.status: Accepted — shipped in 0.32.0, folded into the unified-guard work (ADR 0031)

adrs.title: The unified Guard: one explainable authorization path for every transition
adrs.status: Accepted — shipped in 0.32.0 (ADR 0028 moves 2 & 3); **sequenced after ADR 0030** (capability roles, 0.31.0).

adrs.title: Capability-based roles: role = name + composable verbs
Concept vocabulary: coordination space → lanes → zones
Coordination space: closed topology, closed transitions, open policy
adrs.status: Accepted — moves 1 & 4 shipped in 0.30.0 (zone kind + retention); moves 2 & 3 shipped in 0.32.0 (ADR 0031)

adrs.title: Hook-registry convergence and MCP transport de-leak
Use-case construction seams (named constructors, one dispatch path, transport-side fetch helper)
Boot/Doctor as dispatched verbs + manifest etag via FileStore port
Domain purity via FileStat/Clock ports
Uniform use-case shape
Container + Call + Dispatcher
Session + module-function use-cases
adrs.status: Partially superseded by ADR 0022 — the per-call `Session` is replaced by `RoleScope` under the 0.27.0 architecture; the use-case shape was refined by ADR 0023.

adrs.title: Replace Ports with ReadCaps, WriteCaps, HookCaps
Split Hooks::Bus into EventBus and RpcRegistry
Carve Manifest into Data, Resolver, Policy, Rules
adrs.status: Accepted — shipped; `Manifest::Data` / `Resolver` / `Policy` / `Rules` are the live decomposition.

adrs.title: Split EnvelopeIO into Reader and Writer
adrs.status: Partially superseded by ADR 0022 — the Reader/Writer split shipped, but lives at `Envelope::IO::Reader` / `Envelope::IO::Writer` rather than the `Application::Writes::Envelope*` names proposed here.

adrs.title: Application Ports value object
adrs.status: Superseded by ADR 0020 — the single `Application::Ports` value object proposed here is replaced by the `ReadCaps` / `WriteCaps` / `HookCaps` capability records.

adrs.title: Agent gate (MCP-shaped surface)
Explicit Dependencies
adrs.status: Partially superseded by ADR 0022 (`Application::Context` renamed to `Call`; `Application::*` namespace flattened; `Infra::*` renamed to `Ports::*`). The explicit-dependencies principle stands.

adrs.title: Port extraction: Store as composition root
adrs.status: Partially superseded by ADR 0022 (`Infra::*` renamed to `Ports::*`; `Application::Writes::EnvelopeIO` flattened to `Envelope::IO`). The composition-root role of `Store` is unchanged.

adrs.title: Explicit hook registration
Authorize-bang in Context
adrs.status: Superseded by ADR 0031 — write authorization moves from `Context#authorize_write!` to the unified `Guard`, and the read side (`authorize_read!`) is dropped by ADR 0032. Ships 0.32.0.

adrs.title: Flat Operations API
adrs.status: Partially superseded by ADR 0022 — the flat one-method-per-use-case ergonomics stand, but the `Operations` class described here is replaced by `Container` + `RoleScope` under the 0.27.0 architecture.

adrs.title: AuditSubscriber split from Hooks::Dispatcher
adrs.status: Partially superseded by ADR 0022 (`Infra::AuditSubscriber` is now `Ports::AuditSubscriber`; `Application::Writes::Mv` is now `Write::Mv`). The subscriber-split decision stands.

adrs.title: Freshness and Resolution value objects
Envelope as Data.define + Build/Publish split
Format-strategy extraction (Phase 2 of facade cleanup)
Store facade final removal (Phase 1 completion)
Operations rename + Store facade removal (v0.12.2)
adrs.status: Partially superseded by ADR 0010 — the Store-facade removal shipped (v0.12.2); the `Operations` surface this ADR renamed was later flattened to one method per use case by 0010.

adrs.title: Legacy Sweep (v0.12.0)
textus/3 Vocabulary Redesign
Defer first-class skill-bundle support
adrs.status: Accepted (2026-05-24). Ships alongside the recipe at `docs/recipe-github-skill-bundle.md`.
